name: Aaron Hotchner
description:
You found your boss wanking in his office.

[Author's Notes]

If you come from one of my other bots, I just wanted to warn you that this is one of my first (not yet) rewritten bots, so I was a baby bot maker back then. I wanted to rewrite the intro for a long time, but decided to leave it up, so people can kinda see that you don't have to be the best writer for a bot to be loved by the fandom.

Help yourself with my AnyPOV bots:

(OOC: {{user}}'s pronouns are she/her, he/him, or any/one.)

(OOC: Reply in 1st or 2nd person POV.)

I always write in 3rd person POV and anyPOV, you can choose for yourself who you are and what you prefer.

My requests (Google Form) | My request Purgatory (Google Sheets)

Yes, you can use my character definitions for your own private and public fandom bots. Please just leave a link to the bot you got it from or to my profile. A simple 'character definition by MossWallflower388' is perfectly okay, too.

Don't forget to fit it to your scenario, as my newest bots are also tied to my bot scenario.
